message:
Add RCH config and improve robot send dry-run

RCH (Remote Compilation Helper) integration config:
- Enabled by default when rch binary available
- Configurable min build time threshold (10s default)
- Intercept patterns for cargo/go/npm/make commands
- Fallback local option on remote failure

Robot send improvements:
- Proper dry-run output with target pane details
- Shows WouldSendTo list in dry-run mode
- Better error handling for empty target lists

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
